ohtani.title: Mookie Betts shines on offense, defense in 4-2 win
ohtani.blurb: Mookie Betts has a two-run single and a game-ending double play while Shohei Ohtani adds an RBI in the Dodgers' 4-2 win over the Padres

imanaga.title: Dansby Swanson's four RBIs aids Cubs' win
imanaga.blurb: Dansby Swanson collects four RBIs in the Cubs' 10-5 victory over the Mets

suzuki.title: Wilson, Suzuki lead Cubs to extra-innings victory
suzuki.blurb: Bryse Wilson's scoreless outing out of the bullpen and Seiya Suzuki's two-run single in the 10th to power the Cubs' 4-3 win over the Brewers

yoshida.title: Aaron Boone recaps series vs. Red Sox, talks 5-4 loss
yoshida.blurb: Aaron Boone recaps the Yankees' series against the Red Sox and more following the team's 5-4 loss

okamoto.title: Pederson, Rocker lead Rangers to a 3-2 win
okamoto.blurb: Joc Pederson crushes a leadoff homer and Kumar Rocker strikes out five in six scoreless, leading the Rangers to a 3-2 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Mookie Betts shines on offense, defense in 4-2 win
matsui.blurb: Mookie Betts has a two-run single and a game-ending double play while Shohei Ohtani adds an RBI in the Dodgers' 4-2 win over the Padres
